title: El gran mentiroso
writer: Joaquín Abati, Federico Reparaz, Fernando Soler
actors: Fernando Soler, Anita Blanch, Irma Torres
plot: A respectable, married gent has made up a passel of stories to cover for his fifteen years of frequent pleasure trips to the city. One weekend, one of his city friends meets his daughter in her home town and all his lies and cover...
